message.reasoning_content: We are asked to evaluate a source (zenodo record) and determine if it can concretely improve one of Joni's non-core modules, listed explicitly. The source is about undocumented Mozambican workers on South African farms, focusing on migration, contracts, conditions, etc. It's a social science paper. We need to see if any method, technique, or tool from this paper maps onto any of the allowed modules. The modules are semantics-measurement, conflict-qualifier, reader-sources, emergence, method-trialing. This paper likely presents no computational method, no algorithm, no software tool. It's a qualitative analysis of migration experiences. So it seems inapplicable. Therefore, we should output {"applicable": false}. No need to overthink. The source doesn't describe any method that could be used in the listed modules. So, appropriate JSON.
